items.why: Mobile mode had fast actions but did not compress existing owner, fan, cap, injury, and deadline source-of-truth signals into the narrow-screen daily decision loop.
A passive pressure readout would add information without action. Pressure cards now route to the relevant tab and emit a typed event for future telemetry/tests.

rejected.reason: Still blocked on real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying; no fabricated launch evidence used.
Session 36 cache and audit execution log are exhausted; no reopened source item found.

gameLoopReview.finding: Mobile mode is the highest-leverage session-return surface; pressure must be immediately legible and actionable.
